channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: England vs Croatia – World Cup 2026: Kane, predictions, TV channel, kickoff
item.description: Title contenders England begin their FIFA World Cup campaign against familiar foes Croatia in Group L in Dallas.

item.title: Analysts predict no US petrol price drop until 2027
item.description: US drivers may have to wait until 2027 for gasoline prices to fall

item.title: Satellite images show 10 places where water is disappearing globally
item.description: From lakes to rivers, freshwater is declining worldwide under rising climate and land pressure.

item.title: How past ‘terrorist’ movements are often judged right by history
item.description: Who decides which movements are remembered as terrorists and which are celebrated as agents of change?

item.title: UN chief blames global indifference for Haiti crisis
item.description: UN Secretary-General Antonio Guterres says the international community has failed Haiti as gang violence deepens

item.title: Vozinha’s mum celebrates hero keeper son from afar
item.description: The mother of Cape Verde’s celebrated goalkeeper Vozinha says she watched his heroics on the TV.

item.title: Food shortages spark scuffles outside supermarket in Bolivia
item.description: Food shortages spark scuffles outside supermarket in Bolivia

item.title: Lionel Messi rewrites history books at record sixth World Cup
item.description: Messi scores three exactly 20 years to the day he made his World Cup debut for Argentina.

item.title: Trump administration seeks to halt air pollution lawsuit against Musk’s xAI
item.description: US Department of Justice claims NAACP lawsuit threatens 'national, economic, and energy security'.

item.title: Russian drone strikes residential building in Ukraine
item.description: A suspected Russian drone attack on a residential building in Ukraine has injured at least seven people.

item.title: Messi hat-trick fires holders Argentina to win over Algeria at World Cup
item.description: Argentina open defence of their World Cup crown with a Lionel Messi-inspired 3-0 win against Algeria at 2026 edition.

item.title: Haaland scores two goals as Norway beat Iraq 4-1 on World Cup return
item.description: The Manchester City striker scored his first goals at a major international tournament as Norway powered past Iraq.

item.title: Smotrich says Israel taking control of Hebron
item.description: Israeli Finance Minister Bezalel Smotrich says Israel has transferred authority over Hebron to the army.

item.title: UN reports decline in cross-border fire in southern Lebanon
item.description: UN reports decline in cross-border fire in southern Lebanon

item.title: Ebola patients recover in DRC amid claims of outbreak hoax
item.description: Seven patients have left an Ebola treatment centre in the Democratic Republic of the Congo, having recovered.

item.title: Ghosts of empire: A quarantine centre and Laikipia’s colonial past
item.description: A US Ebola quarantine centre has sparked protests in Laikipia, Kenya, over land and sovereignty concerns.

item.title: Democrat calls for Cape Verde goalkeeper Vozinha’s mother to get US visa
item.description: Ana Candida Evora was unable to travel to watch her son star in a goalless draw with Spain due to the cost of a US visa.

item.title: Which France and World Cup records did Mbappe break against Senegal?
item.description: France captain overtakes Giroud with 58 goals for his country and the most for Les Bleus at a World Cup.

item.title: Iran war live: Israel kills 4 in Lebanon as Trump criticises Netanyahu
item.description: Warning comes as Trump criticises Netanyahu over Israel's attacks on Lebanon.

item.title: Iran will have to leave US hours after every World Cup match, official says
item.description: Mehdi Torabi issued a new visa after previous one expired when team returned to Mexico following the New Zealand game.

item.title: Brazilian court convicts Eduardo Bolsonaro of courting US interference
item.description: US placed tariffs on Brazilian goods and sanctioned judicial officials involved in trial of the father for coup plot.

item.title: US sprinter Noah Lyles sets world best 150m time at Golden Spike meet
item.description: Lyles clocks 14.67 seconds, edges Dambile of South Africa for gold while Australian teenager Gout Gout finishes third.

item.title: Somaliland president visits Israeli Knesset on tour
item.description: Somaliland’s President is on a ‘historic’ tour of Israel, where he’s opened an embassy and visited the Knesset.

item.title: Ghana’s Partey loses appeal to overturn Canadian visa refusal for World Cup
item.description: Thomas Partey will not be able to enter Canada for Ghana's first World Cup match against Panama on Wednesday.

item.title: Mbappe breaks scoring record in France win over Senegal in World Cup
item.description: Kylian Mbappe becomes France's all-time top scorer with 58 goals, two goals off record World Cup scorer Miroslav Klose.
